Made by Dylan Landman

Discover Random Corners of the Web

Hit the button for a random adventure, or browse all 85 tiny interactive sites below.

Finding something cool
Browse all sites

Filter by Category

Educational

Morse Code Sandbox

Learn and Practice Morse Code!

Educational

The Cursor Petting Zoo

Every CSS cursor in its own enclosure — pet them, adopt your favorite

Educational

Binary Ticker

An odometer counting in decimal, binary, octal and hex — the bits are yours to flip

Educational

Pi Digit Distribution

A census of the first million digits of π — sweep the count and watch the digits jockey

Educational

LocalStorage Terminal

A terminal emulator that uses localStorage as a virtual filesystem

Educational

CSS Test

Test and experiment with different CSS styles and effects

Educational

Roman Numeral Converter

Numerals chiseled onto a slab, itemized on the mason's invoice — converts both directions

Educational

Project Idea Slot Machine

Spin the wheels of creativity to generate random project ideas

Educational

Coastline

How long is the coast? Depends how hard you look.

Educational

Chaos Game

Place three dots and watch pure randomness draw a perfect fractal

Educational

How High Can You Hear?

A tone climbs until it vanishes. Find out how old your ears are.

Educational

The Punctuation Cemetery

Retired punctuation marks, laid to rest with full honors. Pay your respects to the exclamation comma.

Educational

Fun & Interactive

The Longest Name

Hello, my name is... build the longest, most decorated name in history, one title at a time

Fun & Interactive

You Are Being Watched

A fake surveillance feed of you — with tracking boxes, biometric readouts, and a rising threat level.

Fun & Interactive

Duplicate

Watch text exponentially duplicate from 1 'a' to infinity

Fun & Interactive

Linguistic Anomalies

Sentences that are grammatically correct, but shouldn't be.

Fun & Interactive

Falling Keys

Type and the keys fall off an invisible keyboard, bounce, and pile up

Fun & Interactive

Scrollympics

Your scrolling career, measured in real distances. Medals included.

Fun & Interactive

Nice Cursor

A cursor so big it shoves the whole page around

Fun & Interactive

Infinite Number Casino

Every number, one at a time. Some are worth something. The house keeps your tab.

Fun & Interactive

Welcome Back

Your visitor time card: it knows exactly how long you were gone, and it keeps records.

Fun & Interactive

Happy Birthday!

Create personalized birthday celebrations with effects

Fun & Interactive

Psychedelic Waves

Paint into a living chemical culture and watch it bloom, crawl, and divide

Fun & Interactive

Password Security Checker

Type a password and get judged: crack-time estimates, itemized violations, and a lock that beefs up as you improve. Nothing leaves the page.

Fun & Interactive

ChatGPT With An Attitude

Chat with a sassy AI assistant

Fun & Interactive

Name a Shape

A shape appears under the spotlight. Name it. Take its portrait.

Fun & Interactive

Write Me a Story

Interactive story writing experience

Fun & Interactive

Checkbox Grid

Interactive grid of checkboxes

Fun & Interactive

Eyes on Me

Use your imagination on this one!

Fun & Interactive

Comic Move Attacks

Click anywhere to unleash epic comic book action effects!

Fun & Interactive

Don't Press The Button

A button, a form on file, and a department that keeps minutes. Do not press it.

Fun & Interactive

Magic 8 Ball

Ask the mystical 8 ball your questions

Fun & Interactive

Visit Counter

An official odometer of your visits. Unique visitors: 1. The button trusts you.

Fun & Interactive

Rube Goldberg Machine

Click START and watch a 10-step chain reaction of satisfying canvas animations

Fun & Interactive

Mirror

Type something and watch it appear in 4 versions: normal, backwards, upside-down, and mirrored — all at once

Fun & Interactive

Cool (and Uncool) Loaders

48 loading animations, loading nothing. Stamp each one COOL or UNCOOL — someone has to.

Fun & Interactive

2,500 Balls

Exactly two thousand five hundred bouncing balls. Count them if you don't believe us.

Fun & Interactive

Camouflage

A white page with white text. It's in there somewhere.

Fun & Interactive

Wet Paint

The sign says do not touch. Everything you touch smears.

Fun & Interactive

The Quietest Site on the Web

0.000 dB and holding. Please do not adjust your volume.

Fun & Interactive

Infinite Maze

Zoom out. The maze keeps going. Zoom out more.

Fun & Interactive

The Dummy Factory

A bear-headed helicopter in clown shoes. Or reroll for one of 29,000 others.

Fun & Interactive

Bubble Wrap

An infinite sheet of bubble wrap. You know what to do.

Fun & Interactive

Can't Touch Me

A button you cannot press. Go ahead, try.

Fun & Interactive

Tools

5 O'Clock Somewhere

It is always, provably, 5 o'clock somewhere. Here's exactly where.

Tools

To Do List

A simple to do list

Tools

Character Counter

Paste anything. The bureau counts it, files a report, and bills someone else's time.

Tools

Names in a Hat

Put names in the hat. Tap the hat. The hat decides.

Tools

Time Meters

Progress bars for the day, week, month, year, decade, century, and millennium

Tools

Timezone Ticket

A live boarding pass between any two time zones. Gate B7, as always.

Tools

Leap Year Test

Submit a year to the Leap Certification Bureau and get a stamped verdict

Tools

ASCII Key Tester

Press any key — its character code gets inspected and the keycap joins the pile

Tools

Password Generator

A mint that strikes passwords one character tile at a time

Tools

Random Color

A random color with its hex, rgb, and hsl — click for another

Tools

Your Birthday, Your Color!

Enter your birthday and get your unique hex color

Tools

What's My Resolution?

Your screen, measured live — resolution, pixel ratio, refresh rate, and every pixel you own

Tools

About My Device

Your device's annual inspection: examined line by line, remarks included, verdict stamped.

Tools

Fractal

Click to split the screen in half, forever. Or shatter everything at once.

Tools

Scoreboard

A tap-to-score scoreboard for any game — track two teams, period, and time

Tools

Paint by Number

Upload a photo, get a numbered kit, and paint it back together. Drag to paint; stay true to the original.

Tools

Picsum Photo Generator

Endless stock photos pinned like polaroids — click one to copy its URL

Tools

Ruler

A real ruler on your screen — calibrate it with a credit card

Tools

Metronome

A big honest metronome. Tap the tempo, it keeps it.

Tools

Games

Font Ninja

Words fly. Slice only the target font. Wrong typeface costs a shuriken.

Games

Fair Die

A certified fair die. The calibration panel is for maintenance purposes only.

Games

3D Snake

Play a 3D version of the classic snake game with improved graphics and physics

Games

The Restoration

The museum's daily painting arrived in pieces. Slide it back together.

Games

Daily Doodle

Draw something new every day based on a daily prompt

Games

Spin the Bottle

Add your friends around the table, rip the bottle, and let it decide.

Games

Largest Number Game

Try to enter the largest number possible

Games

Prop Hunt

One of them is wanted. Find the exact match — the decoys are in on it.

Games

Virtual Piano

Play music on a virtual piano keyboard

Games

Board Game Generator

Generate unique Mario Party-style boards with forks, teleporters, traps, and chaos spaces

Games

Red Light, Green Light

Hold to walk, freeze on red. Momentum is not your friend, and the official is watching.

Games

Reaction Time

Click when the screen turns green. How fast are you?

Games

Shape Match

Same shape or mirrored? Decide fast. One mistake ends it. No appeals.

Games

Balance the Stick

A stick, a cart, and your one job: keep it upright. The wind disagrees.

Games

Pong

Classic Pong

Games

Country Marble Race

Flag marbles, six neon gauntlets, one country eliminated per round. Place your loyalties.

Games

Infinite Tic Tac Toe

Tic tac toe on a board that does not end. Five in a row. The computer is patient.

Games

Colorle

One color a day, six tries to mix it. The department rounds generously.

Games

Clap-o-Meter

Ten seconds. Clap anywhere, as fast as you can. Ring the bell and the meter will remember.

Games

Binary Sudoku

Sudoku with only 0s and 1s. The hardest mode is a 2×2 grid. You will win.

Games

How Many?

Dots flash for half a second — how many were there?

Games

Count a Second

Count the seconds in your head. Find out how wrong your internal clock is.

Games

Perfect Circle

Draw a circle freehand. Get judged to one decimal place.

Games

Entertainment

Severance Dance

Watch the MDR Department dance to your favorite tunes

Entertainment

Lyrics to Songs Without Lyrics

Karaoke for instrumentals. Follow the bouncing ball through every word there isn't.

Entertainment

89 Degree Triangle

A triangle with an 89 degree angle. Extend the edge and watch one degree ruin everything.

Entertainment

Chicanery

I AM NOT CRAZY!

Entertainment

The Magic Number 4

A fun interactive way to learn about the number 4

Entertainment

Christmas Eve Eve Eve...

HOW MANY DAYS UNTIL CHRISTMAS AHHH

Entertainment

What to do

Helps you figure out your priorities for the day...

Entertainment

I'm Sorry :(

A way to "sincerely" apologize to anyone you have wronged

Entertainment

Do You Like Me?

A fun interactive yes/no question with a twist

Entertainment

Meme Soundboard

Play classic meme sound effects and download them

Entertainment

Hatch The Egg

Wait and watch the egg hatch!

Entertainment

WOW

Endless wows. Click for more wow. Hold to spray wow.

Entertainment

Interdimensional DVR

Watch interdimensional cable shows from across the multiverse

Entertainment

Doomscroll

An infinite feed of increasingly absurd headlines. You can't stop scrolling.

Entertainment

Static

TV static that slowly resolves into a hidden message. Wait for it.

Entertainment

The Map

A procedurally generated fantasy map. Different every time.

Entertainment

How Long Have You Been Staring?

A timer. That's it. Just a timer counting how long you've been here.

Entertainment

Grow Your Garden

Click to plant seeds that grow in real time. Come back tomorrow and they're taller.

Entertainment

Confession

Type something anonymously. It disappears. No one reads it. Maybe that's the point.

Entertainment

The Last Survivors

Conway's Game of Life with colored tribes. Place cells, place your bet, watch the chaos.

Entertainment

Translate to Legalese

Type anything casual. Get back an incomprehensible legal document.

Entertainment

Brain Rot Engine

Configure your rot — how many balls, whether they multiply — then let it run.

Entertainment

Drips

A quiet pool of real water. Drag a finger through it.

Entertainment

Shakespeare Insult Maker

Generate Shakespearean-style insults

Entertainment

DVD Bounce

Watch the DVD logo bounce around the screen

Entertainment

Your Phone Has a Crack in It

Your phone has a crack in it. Tap the screen and it will have several.

Entertainment

Unmotivational Quotes

Your daily dose of disappointment

Entertainment

The Last Time

A quiet scroll through the moments that passed without a goodbye

Entertainment

Oddly Specific Horoscopes

The stars have reviewed your file. Today's reading is uncomfortably precise.

Entertainment

On Hold

Your call is important to us. Please continue to hold.

Entertainment

Mindfulness

Wreck Room

Upload a picture of your problem. Take a bat to it.

Mindfulness

Breathe

A circle that breathes. Match it — box, 4-7-8, or resonant pace

Mindfulness

Daily Affirmations

Take a number at the municipal office of morale — affirmations, notarized

Mindfulness

Slow TV

Fourteen procedural ambient channels — fireplace, night train, aurora. Surf with the arrow keys.

Mindfulness

Noise Machine

Mix white, brown, and pink noise with rain, thunder, café chatter, and fan hum — all generated live in your browser.

Mindfulness

Art

Chess Art Generator

Watch chess pieces create beautiful colored patterns on an infinite board

Art

Parallel Lines

Two parallel lines that move infinitely but never meet

Art

Life Of Color Theory

Every day, a new color from the RGB spectrum is displayed in a 45,964-year journey

Art

Library of Everything

View the vast endlessness of numbers

Art

Museum of Bad Art

Procedurally generated terrible abstract paintings paired with pompous gallery descriptions. Infinite collection.

Art

Ink Drop

Click to drop ink into water and watch it bloom, curl, and mix

Art

Rothko Machine

An endless stream of generated color field paintings, each with a deadpan title

Art

Murmuration

A few thousand starlings at dusk. Your cursor is the hawk.

Art

Kaleidoscope

Paint with radial symmetry — every stroke blooms into a mandala

Art

Tessellation

Draw anywhere and your strokes tile into an endless repeating pattern

Art

Weaver

Drag to lay threads on a loom — warp and weft interlace into real cloth

Art

Fireflies

A meadow of fireflies slowly finds one shared rhythm. Click to scatter it.

Art

The Infinite Painting

Zoom into the brushstrokes. There is no bottom.

Art
And more to come...
404

you weren't supposed to scroll this far.

the noise is coming from in here →

Pick a cursor

Sticker album

History
